description: Expand the store internationally by establishing a 'NestWell Europe' Store Group under the Main Website. This group must include a 'French Store View' (code: nestwell_fr) with the 'French (France)' locale and a 'German Store View' (code: nestwell_de) with the 'German (Germany)' locale. Additionally, enable 'Euro' as an allowed currency for the Main Website. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
